2.translation: the Sustainer of all that exists

25.translation: And will be paid in full

50.translation: and so that I make lawful

57.translation: then He will grant them in full

75.translation: with a great amount of wealth

78.translation: so that you may think it

152.translation: so that He may test you

159.translation: the ones who put trust (in Him)

185.translation: you will be paid in full

195.translation: and surely I will admit them
